frames.setting: Overhead shot of a Passover seder table with deep blue tablecloth, seder plate, matzah, wine glasses, and ritual items. Hands are visible interacting with the food.
visual_elements: seder plate with symbolic foods (shank bone, greens, egg, bitter herbs, charoset)
wine glasses filled with red wine
frames.presentation_style: Cinematic observational footage without narration or text overlay. Intimate close-ups of hands and ritual objects. No talking-head framing.

frames.setting: Single frame showing a dark blue background with the NYC mayoral seal (white circular emblem with eagle, shield, and figures, dated 1625).
visual_elements: NYC mayoral seal on navy blue background
frames.presentation_style: Official government branding endcard. Minimal — seal only on solid color field.

summary.dominant_setting: Passover seder table (overhead cinematic shots) transitioning to official NYC mayoral seal endcard
